productDisplayName: Spykar Women's Stripes Navy White T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue and white striped polo-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton in a flat knit, with ribbed white collar and sleeve hems and blue ribbed hemline at the waist, with buttoned placket that extends till bust level and with printed lettering over the left chestFittingComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak Flat dry- avoid twisting or wringing To maintain shape, fold and stack, rather than hang Dry in shade Moderate warm iron Take preppy dressing to the next level with this sailor theme knit  polo-neck tee from spykar. The blue and white stripes and the soft fabric will help you stay cool all summer. Team this with white pants and boat shoes for a complete nautical look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
